flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at The University of Texas at San Antonio rose 34% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.7k → $9.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at The University of Texas at San Antonio rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (28.8% → 32.3%).
